calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem David H.S. Commins, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellants/Defendants:Anderson Rowe & Buckley appears by Richard Buckley-president with counsel Joshua H Willert; no appearance by Skyline Construction.
Respondent/Plaintiff:Randolp J. Pacelli appears with counsel David Edward Bunim.
Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Commins.

9:20am: Counsel Bunim direct examines Mr. Pacelli.
EXHR - HOURS OF WORK/LIST OF EMPLOYEES & PAYSTUBS/INVOICES/PROMISSORY NOTE/MINUTES OF BOARD OF DIRECTOR.
9:36am: Counsel Willert cross examines Mr.Pacelli.
10:03am: Counsel Bunim redirects Mr. Pacelli.
10:05am: Court questions Mr. Pacelli and he responded.
10:12am: Counsel Willert recross examines Mr. Pacelli.
10:17am: summary by both counsels.

10:28am: Matter is submitted. Newly unmarked evidence retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jul-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
